name: ezofficeinventory
description: Reads and writes EZOfficeInventory assets, inventory items, stock assets, members, locations, groups, vendors, and purchase orders through the EZOfficeInventory REST API.

risk.read: external EZOfficeInventory API read of asset, inventory, member, location, group, vendor, and purchase order data
risk.write: external mutation of asset, member, location, group, vendor, and purchase order records; create/update only, no delete actions implemented
risk.approval: writes require approval; reads are unrestricted
